items.title: Family of 95yo Clare Nowland, who died after being tasered, hope inquest will lead to change
items.summary: In an in-depth interview ahead of the inquest into his mother Clare Nowland's nursing home death, Mick says the family wants changes that will prevent another tragedy.

items.title: How salt water is restoring life to parts of the Queensland coast

Now, conservation groups and traditional owners are restoring tidal flows and bringing life back to the land.
